languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

languages.text: "Воистину, тот, кто не может найти себе применение в миру, стремится в бой, чтобы так оправдать свою ценность. Порядок вещей все же незыблем и нерушим".
"In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."
languages.original_text: "Воистину, тот, кто не может найти себе применение в миру, стремится в бой, чтобы так оправдать свою ценность. Порядок вещей все же незыблем и нерушим".

traits.locale_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."
"In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."
"In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

languages.text: «En realidad, quien carece de propósito en el mundo ansía la batalla para justificar su valor. El orden de las cosas es inmutable».
languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

traits.locale_text: «En realidad, quien carece de propósito en el mundo ansía la batalla para justificar su valor. El orden de las cosas es inmutable».

languages.text: 「実のところ、この世で目的を欠く者ほど、自らの価値を正当化せんがために戦いを渇望するものです。物事の秩序は、不変かつ揺るぎなきものであり続けます」
languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

traits.locale_text: 「実のところ、この世で目的を欠く者ほど、自らの価値を正当化せんがために戦いを渇望するものです。物事の秩序は、不変かつ揺るぎなきものであり続けます」

languages.text: “事实上，世上所有缺乏目标的人都渴望战斗，这样他们才能证明自己有价值。万物的秩序依然牢固，不会动摇。”
languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

traits.locale_text: “事实上，世上所有缺乏目标的人都渴望战斗，这样他们才能证明自己有价值。万物的秩序依然牢固，不会动摇。”

languages.text: "Wer in der Welt keine Bestimmung hat, seht sich nach der Schlacht, um seinem Wert zu beweisen. Die Ordnung der Dinge bleibt unabänderlich und unerschütterlich."
languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

traits.locale_text: "Wer in der Welt keine Bestimmung hat, seht sich nach der Schlacht, um seinem Wert zu beweisen. Die Ordnung der Dinge bleibt unabänderlich und unerschütterlich."

languages.text: « En vérité, ceux qui mènent une existence dépourvue de sens désirent se battre afin de prouver leur valeur. L'ordre des choses demeure immuable et inébranlable. »
languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

traits.locale_text: « En vérité, ceux qui mènent une existence dépourvue de sens désirent se battre afin de prouver leur valeur. L'ordre des choses demeure immuable et inébranlable. »

languages.text: "Gerçekte dünyada bir amacı olmayan herkes kendi değerini haklı çıkarmak için savaşmayı arzular. Olayların düzeni değişmez ve sarsılmaz kalır."
languages.original_text: "In truth, whoever lacks purpose in the world yearns for battle so that they might justify their worth. The order of things remains immutable and unshakeable."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekte dünyada bir amacı olmayan herkes kendi değerini haklı çıkarmak için savaşmayı arzular. Olayların düzeni değişmez ve sarsılmaz kalır."
